description: Storage thresholds and tiering rules for Mac-First 500-GB architecture. Speicherknappheit darf NIEMALS zu schlechteren Wahrscheinlichkeiten führen. NAS ist SSH-Remote (neonas), kein lokales Mount.

thresholds_gb.notes: Derived from: hotset ~45 GB + feature store ~66 GB + raw ~6.7 GB + universe history ~9.5 GB + runs/logs ~15 GB = ~160 GB active. Target: 500 GB - 160 GB active - 120 GB buffer.

hot_local.description: All data required for active US+EU best-result pipeline runs
contents: q1step2bars snapshots (latest 2 per active date set — used by Stage A/B)
Feature store v4_q1panel_overnight ALL active partitions

cold_nas.description: Archive on NAS via SSH. Mac never reads from NAS during active compute. Only archive what is 100% proven unused.
contents: q1step2bars snapshots rank > 2 (older than 2nd-latest date — NOT used by training pipeline)
Old feature store versions (ONLY after confirmed not referenced by any active script)
Feature store partitions outside active window (ONLY if confirmed safe)
Old Stage-B runs > 90 days (ONLY if confirmed not needed for reporting)
cold_nas.eviction_policy: copy_verify_catalog_then_delete_local — only archive what is 100% proven unused

nas_config.notes: 10 TB free on NAS. NAS accessible via SSH alias 'neonas'. No local mount required — rsync -az -e ssh.

archive_sequence.reason: SAFE: rank > 2 snapshots are pure backups — training pipeline ALWAYS uses the latest by date/mtime. ~6.7 GB each, 24+ archivable ≈ 160 GB.
SAFE: rank > 2 step1 snapshots are rebuild artifacts only needed for catastrophic recovery. Keep latest 2.
CONDITIONAL: only archive AFTER confirming no active script references the version. Check run_q1_*.py for version strings first.
CONDITIONAL: only archive partitions older than the active training window. Verify partition is not in any running job's input set.
CONDITIONAL: verify run is not referenced by any report or downstream chain.
CONDITIONAL: logs older than 30 days are generally safe.
If still below block_heavy_jobs threshold after all proven-safe archival

quality_contract.archive_safety_rule: ONLY archive data that is 100% proven unused by active training, prediction, reporting, or UI pipelines
